MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Zanghi for Plaintiff Conrad House Inc., who is present.
Jenna Musselman Yott, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Michelle Binder, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 240 Hyde Street, #108, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. Trial date of 6/29/09 is vacated.

JPT. Cary Kletter, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (218)
